title: Fix CSS Grid Layout with Inconsistent Row Height Calculation

statement.markdown: Given a CSS grid layout with dynamic row heights, write a function to calculate the total height of the grid. The function should take as input an object of grid items with their respective heights, and return the total height of the grid.
statement.inputFormat: Object of grid items with their respective heights, where each key is the item name and each value is the height in pixels.
statement.outputFormat: Total height of the grid in pixels.
statement.notes: The grid layout has three rows, and each item's height is specified in the input object. The function should calculate the total height of the grid, including any gaps between rows.

constraints.description: Maximum height of a grid item

examples.explanation: The total height of the grid is the sum of the heights of all items, plus any gaps between rows.
The total height of the grid is the sum of the heights of all items, plus any gaps between rows.
